title: Litebans Anti Mute Bypass
description: Prevent players from bypassing their mute
body:
A plugin that prevents players from bypassing a Litebans mute by preventing them from using signs, renaming items, and writing books.

The plugin also provides a simple configuration that allows you to toggle certain things to be blocked.

**What It Does**

Blocks muted players from:
- Placing or editing signs
- Renaming items in anvils
- Writing in books

**Why Use This**
- Stops players from bypassing mutes through in-game mechanics.
- Simple config to toggle which features are blocked.

**Requirements**
- Requires LiteBans (plugin will not function without it)
- Paper/Spigot 1.20+
